name: io.github.martinsa04/ntnu-mcp
title: NTNU Courses (unofficial)
description: Course data for NTNU, the Norwegian University of Science and Technology: catalog search, teaching schedules, weekly timetables, historical grade statistics, course descriptions and prerequisites, exam logistics (dates, times, permitted aids, rooms), plus course comparison and timetable-conflict checks. Read-only public data, no authentication. Unofficial community server — not affiliated with NTNU.
